## Meeting Purpose

[Explore strategies for expanding RAMP's digital footprint and reducing reliance on affiliate marketing through niche content sites and targeted SEO efforts.](https://fathom.video/share/WSRUAoG3XxfFWt39fAyrwksAoooNQDY7?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [RAMP is spending significant amounts on affiliate marketing with diminishing returns and seeks alternatives](https://fathom.video/share/WSRUAoG3XxfFWt39fAyrwksAoooNQDY7?tab=summary&timestamp=5.0)
  - [GrowthX proposes creating multiple niche sites to target specific business segments and localities](https://fathom.video/share/WSRUAoG3XxfFWt39fAyrwksAoooNQDY7?tab=summary&timestamp=351.0)
  - [The strategy aims to build authority quickly, generate leads, and create a network effect for RAMP's services](https://fathom.video/share/WSRUAoG3XxfFWt39fAyrwksAoooNQDY7?tab=summary&timestamp=1184.0)
  - [Implementation would require careful planning to align with RAMP's target audience and justify the investment](https://fathom.video/share/WSRUAoG3XxfFWt39fAyrwksAoooNQDY7?tab=summary&timestamp=1919.0)

## Topics

### Current Affiliate Marketing Challenges

  - [RAMP spends millions per month on affiliates with diminishing returns](https://fathom.video/share/WSRUAoG3XxfFWt39fAyrwksAoooNQDY7?tab=summary&timestamp=151.0)
  - [Tier 1 affiliate sites prioritize larger competitors (e.g., Amex) over RAMP](https://fathom.video/share/WSRUAoG3XxfFWt39fAyrwksAoooNQDY7?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Affiliate sites are being cited by LLMs at higher rates than other content types](https://fathom.video/share/WSRUAoG3XxfFWt39fAyrwksAoooNQDY7?tab=summary&timestamp=252.0)
  - [RAMP's attempts to create localized content (e.g., accountants.ramp.com) have had mixed results](https://fathom.video/share/WSRUAoG3XxfFWt39fAyrwksAoooNQDY7?tab=summary&timestamp=1060.0)

### GrowthX's Proposed Strategy

  - [Create multiple niche websites targeting specific business types or localities](https://fathom.video/share/WSRUAoG3XxfFWt39fAyrwksAoooNQDY7?tab=summary&timestamp=351.0)
  - [Focus on long-tail keywords and zero-volume searches](https://fathom.video/share/WSRUAoG3XxfFWt39fAyrwksAoooNQDY7?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Utilize AI-driven content creation and workflow automation for rapid site development](https://fathom.video/share/WSRUAoG3XxfFWt39fAyrwksAoooNQDY7?tab=summary&timestamp=578.0)
  - [Implement a multi-faceted approach: SEO, newsletters, lead magnets, and subscriber bases](https://fathom.video/share/WSRUAoG3XxfFWt39fAyrwksAoooNQDY7?tab=summary&timestamp=1221.0)
  - [Cross-link between sites to build authority and create a network effect](https://fathom.video/share/WSRUAoG3XxfFWt39fAyrwksAoooNQDY7?tab=summary&timestamp=1302.0)

### Case Studies and Examples

  - [CodeLibrary.gai: Launched in 5 days for AugmentCode, showing early indexing success](https://fathom.video/share/WSRUAoG3XxfFWt39fAyrwksAoooNQDY7?tab=summary&timestamp=372.0)
  - [FindWeb.ai: Prototype for website template gallery with AI-generated content](https://fathom.video/share/WSRUAoG3XxfFWt39fAyrwksAoooNQDY7?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Tiro.com: Achieved significant organic traffic growth in 6 months with 150 articles](https://fathom.video/share/WSRUAoG3XxfFWt39fAyrwksAoooNQDY7?tab=summary&timestamp=2052.0)

### Potential Focus Areas for RAMP

  - [SMB and mid-market companies (60% of RAMP's current revenue)](https://fathom.video/share/WSRUAoG3XxfFWt39fAyrwksAoooNQDY7?tab=summary&timestamp=1160.0)
  - [Persona-based or company type-based content](https://fathom.video/share/WSRUAoG3XxfFWt39fAyrwksAoooNQDY7?tab=summary&timestamp=1146.0)
  - [Locality-specific information for businesses in middle America](https://fathom.video/share/WSRUAoG3XxfFWt39fAyrwksAoooNQDY7?tab=summary&timestamp=2165.0)
  - [Finance-adjacent topics that appeal to decision-makers for corporate cards](https://fathom.video/share/WSRUAoG3XxfFWt39fAyrwksAoooNQDY7?tab=summary&timestamp=1160.0)

### Implementation Considerations

  - [Balancing immediate conversion goals with long-term authority building](https://fathom.video/share/WSRUAoG3XxfFWt39fAyrwksAoooNQDY7?tab=summary&timestamp=1184.0)
  - [Justifying investment to leadership by comparing to current affiliate spend](https://fathom.video/share/WSRUAoG3XxfFWt39fAyrwksAoooNQDY7?tab=summary&timestamp=1367.0)
  - [Potential for performance-based incentives in partnership with GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/WSRUAoG3XxfFWt39fAyrwksAoooNQDY7?tab=summary&timestamp=2250.0)
  - [Need for careful planning to avoid obvious network manipulation](https://fathom.video/share/WSRUAoG3XxfFWt39fAyrwksAoooNQDY7?tab=summary&timestamp=885.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Luke to consider potential targets within decision-makers for corporate cards](https://fathom.video/share/WSRUAoG3XxfFWt39fAyrwksAoooNQDY7?tab=summary&timestamp=1542.0)
  - [RAMP team to provide GrowthX with personas, target segments, and geographic priorities](https://fathom.video/share/WSRUAoG3XxfFWt39fAyrwksAoooNQDY7?tab=summary&timestamp=351.0)
  - [Explore the possibility of a GrowthX 8-week strategy sprint (30k investment)](https://fathom.video/share/WSRUAoG3XxfFWt39fAyrwksAoooNQDY7?tab=summary&timestamp=2283.0)
  - [Luke to frame the proposal for internal stakeholders, focusing on potential ROI compared to current affiliate spend](https://fathom.video/share/WSRUAoG3XxfFWt39fAyrwksAoooNQDY7?tab=summary&timestamp=1979.0)
  - [Consider an 80/20 approach: 80% targeted content, 20% experimental "wild bets"](https://fathom.video/share/WSRUAoG3XxfFWt39fAyrwksAoooNQDY7?tab=summary&timestamp=2221.0)
